title: Make generated gh shim independent of PATH
description: Generate the gh wrapper so GUI apps can run it even when gh-forgejo-shim is not discoverable through PATH, fixing Codex.app GitHub CLI unavailable detection.
close_reason: Generated gh wrapper now invokes gh_forgejo_shim via the install-time Python executable, so it works in GUI app environments with stripped PATH.

title: Fix Codex PR status detection for Forgejo shim
description: Codex.app still reports pull request status unavailable after detecting the shim. Investigate the gh pr status/view compatibility surface and make the Forgejo shim return the GitHub CLI-compatible output Codex expects.
close_reason: Fixed gh pr status JSON envelope compatibility for Codex.app PR detection.

title: Discover fj macOS auth config
description: Teach auth discovery to read forgejo-cli's macOS Application Support keys.json so GUI apps like Codex can find Forgejo tokens without inherited shell environment variables.
close_reason: Auth discovery now reads fj's macOS Application Support keys.json, allowing Codex.app to find Forgejo auth without inherited token env vars.

title: Build gh-forgejo-shim v1 package
description: Implement the initial stdlib-only Python CLI package, gh wrapper lifecycle, Forgejo PR routing, tests, docs, and turn documentation from the OSS project plan.
close_reason: Implemented the V1 package, CLI wrapper lifecycle, Forgejo PR routing, docs, tests, and turn documentation.

title: Relax shim PATH doctor check
description: Update doctor so it warns only when another gh executable resolves before the managed shim, instead of requiring ~/.local/bin to be the first PATH entry.
close_reason: Doctor now checks whether the managed shim is the first gh executable in PATH instead of requiring its directory to be first.

title: Add live Forgejo integration coverage
description: Add an integration test path that exercises Forgejo-compatible REST responses through a local HTTP fixture or disposable Forgejo test instance, so API behavior is validated beyond unit-level fakes.

title: Add package release automation
description: Add CI and release automation for building, checking, and publishing gh-forgejo-shim once the project is ready for PyPI distribution.
